label: PyQt
description: Qt bindings for Python desktop apps.

topics.label: QApplication & Windows
topics.description: QApplication, QMainWindow, QWidget. Create the app and main window.

topics.label: Widgets
topics.description: QPushButton, QLabel, QLineEdit, QTextEdit, QComboBox, QCheckBox.

topics.label: Layouts
topics.description: QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout, QGridLayout, QFormLayout. Responsive layouts.

topics.label: Signals & Slots
topics.description: Connect widget signals to handler slots. Qt's event system.

topics.label: Qt Designer
topics.description: Visual UI designer — drag and drop widgets, export .ui files.

topics.label: Dialogs & File I/O
topics.description: QFileDialog, QMessageBox, QInputDialog. Standard dialog boxes.
